functionDeclarations.name: read_local_attachment_context
functionDeclarations.description: Read local context from a CAS-backed text or code attachment path available on this device. Document files are handled via Gemini file attachments.

path.description: Local attachment path exactly as referenced by the user.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of context to return. Defaults to 30000 and is capped at 30000.
